roa.docketEntryComment: DA'S NON-OPP MOT SET ASIDE GUILTY PLEA, VACATE PRIOR JDGMNT & CONV FILED
DEFT'S UNOPPOSED MOTION VACATE CONVICTION UNDER A PETITION FOR A WRIT OFERROR CORAM NOBIS FILED

/CAL  DEFENSE MOTION TO VACATE CONVICTION UNDER A PTITION FOR A WRIT OF RROR CORAM NOBIS/MO GRTD/CTORD: THE SENTENCE OF 08-26-94 IS VACATED/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT'S CONVICTIONS OF FELONY VIOLATIONS OF PC 273,5(A), PC422, PC 236 AND PC 245(A)1, ARE VACATED AND NEW PLEAS OF NOT GUILTY ARE ENTERED//X: AT THIS TIME, THE PEOPLE'S MOTION TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT ADDING COUNT 5, A FELONY VIOLATION OF PENAL CODE SECTION 245(A)(4) IS GRANTED,/IRRC/FAWC/17B/DEFT ADV ANG:5/TWS/CH5:PJ364D/CTS:364/VF5:150/COA:40/ICNA/CTORD: COLLECTION OF FINES AND FEES IS PERMANENTLY SUSPENDED/OBEY/ACCEP/DISM3/BE/NUNCDAT: 08-26-94/X: SEE WRITTEN ORDER,/
/TEXT:JUDGMENT AFFIRMED; REMITTITUR SPREAD UPON MINUTES/
SPN INT SW-CHU/P;AJW/CH1-SP3Y(M)/CH2-SP2Y(M),CC/CH3-SP3Y(M),CCCH4-PJ180D & CTS180D/282CJ--140SAGE=CTS422D/PAROLE & APPEAL RTS
SPN INT SW-FURZE/G;CONT 8/26/94 AT 830AM IN S25 FOR SENT/1203,03PC

SEE 4/8/94 IN D25 CALENDAR
CONT 5/5/94 AT 845AM IN S25 FOR SENT
JURY FND DEFT NG CT4-245(A)(1)PC/F AND FND G CT4-242PC/M,L&IOFF
JURY FND DEFT G CTS1-273,5(A)PC,CT2-422PC/F,CT3-236PC/F
CONT 4/11/94 AT 10AM IN S25 FOR JURY TRIAL
SPN INT SW-PERRY/P;CONT 4/8/94 AT 10AM IN S25 FOR JURY TRIAL
CONT 4/7/94 AT 10AM IN S25 FOR JURY TRIAL
CONT 4/6/94 AT 10AM IN S25 FOR JURY TRIAL
DA MO DISM CT4-245(A),1PC/F;CT5 BECOMES CT4;
CONT 4/5/94 AT 845AM IN S25 FOR JURY TRIAL
CONT 4/4/94 AT 845AM IN S25 FOR JURY TRIAL
CONT 3/31/94 AT 845AM IN S25 FOR PTC/TRIAL
GTW W/D AS OF 3/28/94;TRANSF TO D25 FOR TRL AT 10AM ON 3/29/94
CONT TO 3/28/94 FOR TRIAL AT 930AM IN D22
CONT TO 3/25/94 FOR TRIAL AT 930AM IN D22
CONT TO 3/24/94 FOR TRIAL AT 930AM IND 22
CONT TO 3/23/94 FOR TRIAL AT 930AM IN D22
CONT TO 3/22/94 FOR TRIAL AT 930AM IN D22
CONT TO 3/21/94 FOR TRIAL AT 930AM IN D22

CONT TO 3/8/94 FOR TRIAL AT 930AM IN D22
SPN INT SW-TURENNE/R;PEO'S MO QUASH DEFT'S SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM GRTDPEO'S MO TO QUASH USE OF ALL ILLEGALLY OBTAINED MATERIAL THEREFROM GRTD
SPN INT SW-BEN;MO CONT TRL BY DEF-GRTD;DEFT ENT GEN TIME WAIVERCONT 3/7/94 FOR TRL AT 930AM IN D22;ORAL MO TO REDUCE BAIL-DENIED
CRT GRTS ATTY APPT-LEVINE/H;MO FOR BAIL DEN;DEEMED PRETRIED
TRANSF TO D25 FOR PTC F/W

CONT 12/1/93 FOR ARR IN D22 AT 9AM
HTA, BAIL RESET AT $25,000, DEFT REMANDED
